title: Gungan Swamp
content:

The animals in this vicinity have been classed A-1 for vicious behavior.|[[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9]]|}} The '''Gungan Swamp''' was the name of all the swamps and marshes that covered most of the surface of the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. ==Description== The Gungan Swamp was named after the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] who inhabited the area. The Gungan Swamp was a complex and rich primeval ecosystem made of swamplands, tidal bassins, inland seas, sloughs, rivers, grasslands, ponds, lakes, lone mountains, cliffs and craggs. The waterways and channels that composed the Gungan Swamp were constantly changing, making travel very difficult. A large number of vegetal and animal species completed this ecosystem. It included large animals such as [[Falumpaset/Legends|falumpasets]], [[Fambaa/Legends|fambaas]], [[Ikopi/Legends|ikopis]] and [[Kaadu/Legends|kaadus]]. [[File:Gungan_Sacred_Place.png|thumb|left|250px|The [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]].]] Several wetlands composed the Gungan Swamp, including the [[Lianorm Swamp/Legends|Lianorm Swamp]], the [[Eastern swamps/Legends|Eastern swamps]], the [[Lasay Swamp]] and the [[Paitnnu Wetlands]]. The Lianorm Swamp stretched over an area of thirty-four square miles and was located on the edge of [[Lake Paonga/Legends|Lake Paonga]] and the foothills of the [[Gallo Mountains/Legends|Gallo Mountains]]. The Lianorm Swamp was noteworthy for being the location of the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]] and [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]]. ==History== {{Quote|My troops are in position to begin searching the swamps for these rumored underwater villages. They will not stay hidden for long.|OOM-9|{{Film|I}}}}
[[File:TF_landing_Naboo.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces landing in the [[Lianorm Swamp]].]]
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] landed its forces in the Lianorm Swamp during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. It was from here that [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] led [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to Otoh Gunga. After the [[Capture of Theed/Legends|Fall of Theed]], Trade Federation forces deployed in the Gungan Swamp to [[Siege of Otoh Gunga|raid]] Gungan villages. [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] later went to the Gungan Sacred Place to meet [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] and finally form an alliance between the Gungans and the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Gungan Swamp}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' *{{Tales|3|The Death of Captain Tarpals}} *{{Film|I}} *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' junior novelization]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Jedi Power Battles'']] *''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' *''[[Episode I: Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'' {{Flash}} *{{StoryCite|story=End Game|book=Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|bformatted=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization, 2012 edition}} *[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']] *{{TCW|Blue Shadow Virus (episode)}} *{{GalaxiesAED}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|47|Creatures of Episode I}} *''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]'' *''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' {{1stID|Gungan Swamp}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|65|NAB 25-28|Naboo – Swamp}} *[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|augie|Jowil, Augara "Augie"}} *{{DB|creature|mott|mott}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Swamps]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Gungan Swamp locations]] }}
